headline: Does Expanding Its GBG Fraud Partnership Reshape Equifax’s (EFX) Digital Identity Ambitions?
summary: Earlier in May 2026, GBG announced it is expanding its partnership with Equifax into the US, integrating Equifax Identity and Fraud solutions into its GBG Go platform while Equifax embeds GBG’s data verification in its own US offerings. This two-way integration creates a broader identity and fraud prevention toolkit for both companies’ clients, potentially deepening Equifax’s role in global digital identity verification. Next, we’ll examine how this expanded fraud and identity partnership...

headline: Canadian Insolvency Volumes in Q1 Reach Highest Level Since 2009, Says Equifax
summary: Canadian insolvency volumes in Q1 have increased to levels not seen since 2009, up 18.8% year-over-y

headline: Yardi expands RentCafe Renter Essentials in Canada with Zenbase partnership
summary: Yardi® today announced the expansion of RentCafe® Renter Essentials in Canada through a strategic partnership with Zenbase, a Canadian financial health platform. The partnership brings flexible rent payment options and automated rent reporting directly into the RentCafe resident portal, helping residents improve their financial well-being while reducing delinquency and administrative burden for property managers.

headline: The Resilient North: Equifax Canada Data Shows Consumers Leaning on Financial Discipline to Offset Macroeconomic Conditions
summary: – Latest report shows emerging credit stress slowed in Q1 but lingering effects of high interest rates and inflation led to highest insolvency levels since 2009 – Equifax Canada® Market Pulse Quarterly Consumer Credit Trends and Insights TORONTO, May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Equifax® Canada’s Q1 2026 Market Pulse Quarterly Consumer Credit Trends and Insights reveals a complex start to the year for Canadian credit.
